title: TAOCP Algorithm M: worst-case running-maximum updates
statement_informal: Scanning a list left to right keeping a running maximum, the number of times the maximum is updated is at most the list length (worst case = strictly increasing input).

cost_model.notes: One potential max-update (the assignment k:=j in Algorithm M) per scanned element; at most length-many.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 1 §1.2.10 — Algorithm M (finding the maximum) and its average-case analysis (number of register changes = H_n − 1).
Average case is the conjecture-track artifact tools/conjecture/results/algorithm-m-maxima.json (E = H_n − 1 updates; H_n left-to-right maxima).
